availability_notes: Contribution opportunities and program information are made available in all driver license offices.
Donations may also be made online during driver license and identification card transactions.
Contribution opportunities can only be made when conducting a driver license or identification card transaction and may not be available for all transactions.

programs.name: Donate Life Texas
programs.type: Organ, eye, and tissue donor registry (after-death donation registration via DPS)
programs.who_can_participate: Applicants/renewals for Texas DL, ID, or CDL during transaction
programs.key_note: Registration through DPS covers donation after death only (not living donation).

programs.name: Living Organ Donation (Information)
programs.type: Information on living donation (kidney or part of liver)
programs.eligibility_high_level: Potential living donor must be 18+ and in good physical and mental health; screening required.

programs.name: Glenda Dawson Donate Life Texas Donor Registry
programs.type: Donation-funded registry named in honor of Glenda Dawson

programs.name: Blindness Education Screening and Treatment Program (BEST)
programs.type: Free vision screenings + financial assistance for medically urgent eye treatment (with ophthalmologist referral)
programs.who_can_donate: Applicants/renewals for Texas DL or ID during transaction

programs.name: Texas Veterans Assistance Fund
programs.type: Voluntary contribution fund supporting veterans in need
programs.who_can_donate: Applicants/renewals for Texas DL or ID during transaction
assists_with_examples: Critical home repairs and accessibility improvements for service-connected disabled
Rehabilitation support for justice-involved veterans through specialized courts

programs.name: Survivors of Sexual Assault (Evidence Testing Support)
programs.type: Voluntary contributions supporting testing of collected evidence for sexual assault/sex offenses
programs.administered_by: Criminal Justice Division of the Office of the Governor (grant program)

programs.name: Texas Bone Marrow Donation & Transplant
programs.type: Bone marrow donor recruitment program (education + recruitment)

programs.name: Identification Fee Exemption Fund
programs.type: Assists in payment of DL/ID fees for foster and homeless children/youths and victims/children of family or dating violence
